title: silene sedoides subsp. sedoides
intro: Silene sedoides subsp. sedoides, also known as Needle Spurry or Needle-leaved Catchfly, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Silene sedoides subsp. sedoides is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
